Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_COMMON_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}Shadow eliminated! Good work![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_COMMON_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}There might be a treasure chest up ahead, but I sense an enemy presence there, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If you're worn out from battling, don't push yourself too hard. Take some time to recuperate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_COMMON_FUKA_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It looks as though you've defeated all of the Shadows in this area.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}All we have to do now is open that treasure chest. Let's do it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_RETURN_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Please be careful. It's easy to get lost here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_RETURN_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Understood. I'll continue to provide support.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If it gets dangerous, don't hesitate to retreat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_0_1_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}...Was I the only one who thought this would be easy? 'Cause it definitely wasn't, and that kinda caught me off-guard.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 0 0 0}Well, guess I know better than to judge a book by its cover now. Next time I'll be more careful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 0 0 0}Looks like there's more up ahead, so let's check it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_0_1_JUNPEI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2115 0 0}Phew... Glad that's over. Thought it'd be a cinch, but boy was I wrong.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 0 0 0}Tryin' to catch us off-guard, eh? But it'll take more than that to bring us down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 0 0 0}Anyways, there's treasure up ahead, right? C'mon, let's go grab our loot![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_0_1_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}That fight was tougher than I thought it'd be.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 0 0 0}Maybe the enemy tried to pull one over on us by pretending to be weak? Not that dirty tricks like that would work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}There's still more up ahead. Let's keep moving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_0_1_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}That was quite a powerful enemy... Or perhaps I was simply underestimating its strength.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}In which case, I apologize. I should've known better than to assume, especially since it'll be our lives at risk.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}Let's stay focused and keep moving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_0_1_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}Shadow eliminated! Great job, everyone![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It looked like any other Shadow we've encountered, but it was actually a lot stronger, wasn't it...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Let's brace ourselves in case something like this happens again and proceed with caution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_0_2_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}Seems like Shadows with different affinities are banding together. They even brought their own support.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}If they're working together as a team, then things could get dicey.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}But I suppose this proves that teamwork significantly increases a group's combat power.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 0 0 0}So we'll be counting on you, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_0_2_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4078 0 0}Just now... each Shadow had a designated role, and their actions were all well-coordinated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}A team where individuals can cover each other's weaknesses can be formidable, but at least we emerged victorious.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 0 0 0}This was all because we have a particularly exceptional leader. I'll be counting on you for the next battle as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_0_2_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}Those Shadows just now... Each of them had a unique set of abilities, which made them a really balanced team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If Shadows are going to be working together from here on out, we'll need to be extra careful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}But if we can figure out what tactics they're using, then maybe we can exploit their weaknesses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}I'll stay on top of the analysis, so I'm counting on you to make the calls, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_0_2_AEGIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}The team we fought just now was comprised of Shadows, each one with an ability they exceled at.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}For instance, I excel at eliminating enemies with my firearms.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}...Though you may already be aware of that. At any rate, let us continue onward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_1_1_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5068 0 0}I'm not sure if it's just coincidence, but that enemy resembled a die...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Did it have a set course of action depending on the roll? Like, each number is tied to a specific action?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}If that is the case, then that's pretty risky. I can't imagine leaving everything to chance like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}But I guess everyone could use a little luck sometimes. I wish you all the best of luck in your next battle as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_1_2_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Another dice enemy... And when this one rolled let's say a four, for example, it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Um, I'm complicating things... It just used different attacks from the other one. But maybe there was a pattern to its behavior...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}The next enemy might not necessarily be another dice one, though. But keep in mind that some enemies may have patterns.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Shall we keep going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_1_3_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}I was too occupied with fighting that thing to even notice at first, but is there really some kinda pattern with the dice roll...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 0 0 0}Oh well, we won in the end, so clearly luck's on our side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 0 0 0}Who knows? Maybe we'll get really lucky and hit the jackpot with the treasure chest up ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 0 0 0}Or maybe not. Anyway, let's go check it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_1_3_JUNPEI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2115 0 0}To be honest, I wasn't really paying attention, but did the dice roll actually do anything?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 0 0 0}Does it even matter? We won! So I guess we were just stronger and luckier than them![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 0 0 0}Wait a sec... Does that mean we'll hit the jackpot big time when we pop open the treasure chest!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 0 0 0}Oh dude, what if gold and gems start pouring out!? We'd be rich! Set for life! C'mon, let's check it out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_1_3_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}Looks like the dice roll had something to do with the attacks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If luck is a decisive factor in battle, then how would you go about improving your luck...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_3_1_3_KOROMARU_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Oh, I think Koro-chan is telling us to pray at the shrine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Heehee, you might be right, Koro-chan. We should swing by the shrine when we go on walks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_0_1_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5114 0 0}Getting poisoned is scary... It continuously depletes your health.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Make sure you always have some way to cure it whenever you explore Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}But on the flip side, it could be a potent strategy against our enemies. You should try using it when you get the chance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_0_2_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}Enemy annihilated. Great work![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}It's kind of unfair how the enemy could drain your energy... Even though we won, this could affect our progress.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We can expect to encounter another powerful enemy up ahead. If you think fighting might be too risky, then I suggest retreating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_0_3_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3095 0 0}That was one powerful enemy, but there's no way I'll lose in a test of strength.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}The Shadow with the feminine figure showed us no mercy though. It kinda reminded me of Mi—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 -1 0 0 0}Never mind. I value my life too much to say any more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_0_3_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}Good work. You managed to take down that powerful Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}By the way, just a random thought I had, but that chair the Shadow was on...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}How did it float in the air? Was there some kind of jet attached? Or an anti-gravity device? But what would it use as fuel...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Oh! Sorry. It was just bugging me, that's all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}A-Anyway, I'm just glad you were able to beat it. Let's go take a look at the treasure chest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_0_3_AEGIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}That Shadow took the form of what I assume to be the "Holy Mother"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}Perhaps every mother in this world is capable of executing such powerful, devastating attacks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6142 0 0}I comprehend... I shall exercise caution so that I may never anger one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_0_3_AEGIS_H
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6110 0 0}That Shadow took the form of what I assume to be the "Holy Mother"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}Perhaps every mother in this world holds the same devastating power.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}I now understand why mothers are comparable to bears. They must become terribly ferocious when poked.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_0_3_ARAGAKI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9105 0 0}Dunno if these Shadows have a gender or whatever, but that one packed a punch.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 0 0 0}Anyway, never piss off a woman. Especially Ki—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 0 0 0}I didn't phrase that right. Forget it, let's move.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 2 -1 0 0 0}Seriously. Just... forget about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_1_1_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5114 0 0}A monster with a human body and a bull's head, trapped within a labyrinth...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}As if it were some mythological creature... One with terrifying strength, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}But you were able to beat it! That's incredible.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Keep up the good work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_1_2_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Black and white castles... Aren't there similar pieces in chess?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}But black and white would be on opposing sides in chess... Why would they team up?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Well, regardless, you were able to checkmate them easily. Let's keep moving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_1_3_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}The opponents just now... Do you remember them? We've defeated them before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}They're much tougher to beat when they're together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 0 0 0}...Though I suppose the same could be said about us. It's a good reminder that teamwork is important.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_1_3_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}Do you remember those enemies? We've beaten them before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It seems like their strength grows exponentially when they team up. It's not as simple as adding one plus one...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It feels weird to take a hint from a Shadow, but we should make sure our teamwork is just as solid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_1_3_AMADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7001 0 0}That knight we fought just now... It looked pretty cool, didn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 0 0 0}Kinda like one from a fairytale. You know, where a knight gallantly saves a princess from an evil dragon?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 0 0 0}Well, that's just a bedtime story for little kids. Not like there's a princess I wanna save or anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 0 0 0}I-I really don't, okay? C-C'mon, let's keep moving![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_4_1_3_KOROMARU_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Good job, Koro-chan! How about a treat?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}That Shadow you just fought was on horseback, right? I hear horses like carrots...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Why don't I make carrots mixed with rice for this occasion? Maybe I should leave the carrots raw to give them some texture...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_5_0_1_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5070 0 0}It looked like that one Shadow had a bunch of underlings this time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}The four of them gave up their lives to protect the snake-like Shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}I wonder why they'd be willing to sacrifice themselves... Makes you think a little.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_5_0_2_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}A lot of Shadows are really similar... How many variations does that one Shadow even have?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 0 0 0}Ugh, this is so confusing... Why don't we just pull off the plates and paint them all the same color?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 0 0 0}Wait, that won't solve anything... Oh god, I'm losing my mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_5_0_2_JUNPEI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2124 0 0}You know those Shadows that look like scales? I get confused tryna keep track of 'em.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 0 0 0}Okay, question: what color plates did the last one have?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 0 0 0}Black, right...? Wait, no, hold up. The body was black... Right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_5_0_2_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}Those Shadows look unbalanced, but remain upright. It's like they don't wanna go down—not without a fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}Incidentally, when boxers weigh in, they usually use mechanical scales rather than digital ones.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 0 0 0}Not because of tradition or anything. If you're interested, try looking it up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_5_0_2_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5063 0 0}Don't you get kinda tempted to put stuff on the plates? See if those scales actually work?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}I mean, those Shadows looked pretty sturdy, so maybe Yukari-chan and I could get on and—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}A-Actually, never mind! Bad idea. That might reveal a little too much information...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_5_1_1_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}That was such a creepy Shadow. Thank goodness you managed to beat it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}I don't really believe in ghosts or anything, but if something like that showed up at night...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}...Then again, now that we've actually defeated it, I don't think I'd be as scared. Kinda weird how I'm unfazed by these things now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_5_1_2_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4122 0 0}Five of them appeared all at once this time. Were they supposed to be... What is it called...? "Featherman"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 0 0 0}I know they star in their own TV show... The Kirijo Group has sponsored them before, if I remember correctly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 0 0 0}Hm... Do they ever ride motorbikes? Or perhaps that was a different show...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_5_1_2_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Five individuals, each with different colors, working together as a team... Kind of like those Featherman shows for kids.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Oh, maybe I shouldn't say they're just for kids. I hear they're actually very well done and enjoyed by people of all ages.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It could be fun if each of us chose a different color to wear. I guess you'd be red since you're the leader, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}I should ask Amada-kun about it. He seems to know a lot about Featherman.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_5_1_2_AEGIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}...The battle has already concluded? Strange. These results contradict pre-existing data.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}When fighting a group of five colorful opponents, there is another battle phase where we grow to gargantuan sizes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 0 0 0}Or perhaps we were supposed to pilot a giant robot...? I must review my data when I have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_5_1_2_AMADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}Gold, silver, black, white, and pink... That's a rare combination.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 0 0 0}Would they be called... the Tartarangers? Er, no, that sounds kinda lame...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 0 0 0}O-Oh, nothing! I-I wasn't thinking about Featherman or anything dumb like that! C-C'mon, let's keep going![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_6_0_1_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5114 0 0}It feels unfair that it could get in so many shots at once...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}But I guess we shouldn't expect the enemy to fight fair and square. They're doing all they can to take us down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}We can't let them have their way, so you've got my full support![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_6_0_2_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5113 0 0}That was tough... The sight of four samurai in full armor is really intimidating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Did you spot the slight variations in their helms? Maybe Mr. Ono knows why they're different, since history's his field and all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}Then again, he might just go on and on and on... until the Shadows would eventually die from boredom.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Well... Let's keep going. There's still another powerful Shadow up ahead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_6_0_3_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}That was the toughest battle yet... But we won![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 0 0 0}Who would've thought we'd be able to take down something like that way back when...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 0 0 0}Oh, it was obvious how scared I was at the start? Well, maybe you just have nerves of steel...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 0 0 0}Anyway, we've managed to make it this far, so let's keep fighting till the very end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_6_0_3_JUNPEI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2118 0 0}Awww yeah! We gave one massive ass-whoopin' tonight![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 0 0 0}Nothing beats the power of friendship! The bond we all share is stronger than anything—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 0 0 0}Huh? Who am I to talk? Er, yeah, I guess you got a point there... Especially after all the trouble I caused.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 -1 0 0 0}But I'm gonna make it up to you! Just you watch! Junpei Iori's gonna hit that grand slam homer![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 0 0 0}Oh, c'mon, dude... Would it kill ya to say somethin'? Like "I'm countin' on you, bro"?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_6_0_3_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 0 0 0}This might've been the toughest Shadow we've faced yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 0 0 0}Not a bad warmup before our final match, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}It's almost over... This time, we're the challengers, so let's keep up the momentum.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_6_0_3_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}I never imagined that we would get this far, never mind defeat an enemy this powerful...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}A year ago, I would've thought it impossible. Honestly, I'm astounded by my own personal progress...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 0 0 0}This is all because of our impeccable teamwork. I really appreciate all that you've done.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}And I promise to do all that I can up to the very end, so I ask that you lend me your strength until then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_6_0_3_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5114 0 0}That last Shadow was just as powerful— No, even more powerful than the large Shadows we faced every month.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We've fought so many of them now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}But you all come out of every battle stronger. It never ceases to amaze me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Watching everyone fight motivated me to improve myself. Thank you for inspiring me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Er... I guess it's a little too early to say something like that though. What I mean to say is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Let's keep pressing forward, fighting hard all the way until the end![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_6_0_3_AEGIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}...I was designed to be a weapon. The reason I exist is to destroy Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 0 0 0}That's something that won't ever change, but that's not my only purpose now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 0 0 0}It's difficult to put into words, but I wish to stay by everyone's side—by your side, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 0 0 0}And that is why I'll continue to fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_6_0_3_AMADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7115 0 0}Sure, it looked like a giant monster, but I wasn't worried we'd lose—not even for a second![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 0 0 0}There's no way it was stronger than the final enemy. If we couldn't even beat that thing, we wouldn't stand a chance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 0 0 0}Not that I'm underestimating the enemy or anything. I just feel like... I gotta be brave.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 0 0 0}Because I don't want to let anyone down. Not you... Not him either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 0 0 0}So we have to keep fighting![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_6_0_3_KOROMARU_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5132 0 0}Koro-chan looks ready for anything. It's easy to tell.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}I might not understand him as well as Aigis, but I picked up a few things from all the time we've spent together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Koro-chan says he's counting on you, {f 4 1}-kun. Let's fight together, to the very end.[n]{f 1 1}
